spec_match.rationale: Successfully demonstrates basic shapes in offset-path with rounded corners using polygon(round ...).

interactive.rationale: Features comprehensive interactive controls for shapes, radius, speed, play/pause, and a live SVG guide overlay.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the milestone feature description showcasing offset-path support.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes active feature detection and fallback warnings, as well as a direct side-by-side sharp vs rounded comparison.

references.rationale: Provides the required ChromeStatus link and MDN references.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the design system, relying on global button styles and utilizing standard spacing/color variables.

summary: A very strong interactive demonstration of CSS Motion Path integration with the new rounded polygon feature, complete with side-by-side visual comparison and robust controls.
